taskTemplate.name: Deliver Mortgage
taskTemplate.description: Deliver the recorded mortgage based on loan disposition

subTaskTemplate.name: Deliver to Secondary
subTaskTemplate.description: Deliver to Secondary – Deliver the recorded mortgage to the secondary market investor per delivery instructions.

subTaskTemplate.name: Add Loan Number to First Page
subTaskTemplate.description: Add Loan Number to First Page – Add the loan number to the first page of the mortgage before delivery to operations.
subTaskTemplate.type: Deliver Mortgage – Add Loan Number to First Page

subTaskTemplate.name: Upload to Identifi
subTaskTemplate.description: Upload to Identifi – Upload the mortgage to Identifi.

subTaskTemplate.name: Send to Operations
subTaskTemplate.description: Send to Operations – Send the mortgage to operations for portfolio retention.
